code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:8080/api/sessions';const getHeaders=()=>{const userId=localStorage.getItem('userId');const sessionId=localStorage.getItem('sessionId');return{'X-User-Id':userId,'X-Session-Id':sessionId};};export const getSessions=async()=>{const response=await axios.get(API_URL,{headers:getHeaders()});return response.data;};export const terminateSession=async id=>{const response=await axios.delete(`${API_URL}/${id}`,{headers:getHeaders()});return response.data;};export const terminateAllSessions=async()=>{const response=await axios.delete(`${API_URL}/logout-all`,{headers:getHeaders()});return response.data;};
